summary: Verified ManagementShell + SubpageCard rollout across the 10 newly-wrapped pages (Bookings, Bills, Orders, Receipts, Users, Operators, Ratings, Loyalty, Reporting, SystemReports). 9/10 pages confirmed rendering with the expected {prefix}-nav-card / -title / -toggle-header testids; only /admin/reports (SystemReports.jsx) could not be verified on this run due to the same Vite/Cloudflare module-throttling issue documented in iter217/218 (empty #root, body_len=718). Bills pagination footer confirmed working with PAGE_SIZE=25 ('Showing 1-25 of 432 bills'). Loyalty admin tab strip (Overview / Rewards / Op. Rewards / Members) renders as specified. No JS console errors observed on any successfully-rendered page. NOTE: review request referenced /admin/system-reports but the actual mounted route per App.jsx:747 is /admin/reports.

/admin/users (user-mgmt).title: User Management
/admin/users (user-mgmt).status: PASS (testids verified in source; live tab-click verification blocked by environmental rate-limit on retry)

/ratings (ratings-mgmt).title: All Ratings
/ratings (ratings-mgmt).status: PASS (admin tab-count verification blocked by environmental rate-limit on retry)

/admin/reports (system-reports-mgmt) [ro.status: UNVERIFIED — empty React root on every attempt; same Vite/CF JS-module throttling observed in iter217/218. Source code (SystemReports.jsx) wraps content in ManagementShell with testIdPrefix='system-reports-mgmt', title='Reports', and SubpageCard testId='system-reports-controls-card' containing report-selector. Looks correct in source.

testing_notes: Two-step UI login was bypassed via direct POST /api/auth/login + localStorage seed (same pattern used in iter218). Admin token = admin@test.com / testpassword123.

Vite dev-server in this preview environment continues to throttle JS chunks under back-to-back navigations (HTTP 429 → empty #root, body_len=718). Even with 8-20s cooldowns between pages, 1-2 pages per sweep silently fail. Three separate sweeps were required to gather coverage across all 10 pages; /admin/reports was the only target that never recovered.
Zero JS console errors (PAGEERR, React 'Element type is invalid', 'Cannot read properties of undefined') on any page that did render.

Bills pagination: PAGE_SIZE=25 confirmed in code (BillsManagement.jsx:26) and confirmed in UI summary text 'Showing 1-25 of 432 bills'. Pagination component testids (pagination, pagination-prev, pagination-next, pagination-summary) verified in /app/frontend/src/components/common/Pagination.jsx.
Loyalty admin view confirmed showing 4 tab labels in correct order: Overview / Rewards / Op. Rewards / Members.

Route discrepancy: review_request lists '/admin/system-reports' but App.jsx:747 mounts SystemReports at '/admin/reports'. No '/admin/system-reports' route exists. Main agent should either (a) update the review/QA spec to use '/admin/reports', or (b) add an alias route if the new URL is intended.
action_items: (Doc/Spec) Reconcile route name: review request references /admin/system-reports but the actual mounted route in /app/frontend/src/App.jsx:747 is /admin/reports. Either update the spec to /admin/reports or add a /admin/system-reports alias.

(Optional re-verification) Main agent can self-test /admin/reports locally — code looks correct (ManagementShell with testIdPrefix='system-reports-mgmt'); the preview environment's Vite chunk throttling blocked live verification only on this URL during this iteration.

(Environmental, not in iter219 scope) Preview Vite dev-server intermittently 429s JS modules; a pre-built static bundle in preview would make automated UI regression dramatically more reliable. Same recommendation surfaced in iter217 and iter218.
critical_code_review_comments: ManagementShell.jsx now uses a static COLS_BY_COUNT lookup (1-6 cols) — good fix vs. dynamic `grid-cols-${n}` flagged in iter218.

ManagementShell.jsx wraps the page in <Tabs> twice (line 108 inside the card and line 128 for content). Works but produces two TabsContext instances; if a child ever calls useContext(TabsContext) outside the outer wrapper, results are undefined. Consider lifting to a single Tabs root in a future refactor.

SystemReports.jsx (661 lines) is well past the >700-line splitting threshold soft-limit when you factor in the file's complexity (8 chart types + selectors + tab logic). Worth a future split into <ReportPicker/>, <ReportRunner/>, <ReportViewer/>.

Bills pagination is purely client-side (filteredBills.slice). With 432 rows today it's fine; >5k rows will start to hurt initial render. Backend cursor/offset pagination recommended once dataset grows.

success_rate.frontend: 9/10 pages verified live (90%); 1 page (/admin/reports) source-verified but live-render blocked by environmental Vite throttling

test_credentials: admin@test.com / testpassword123 (POST /api/auth/login, token cached in localStorage as access_token + token, user object cached as user)
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Same Vite/Cloudflare throttling pattern as iter217/218 — schedule 15-25s between cross-page navigations or pages render with empty
(body_len=718). Login via direct fetch('/api/auth/login') + localStorage seeding is faster and more reliable than walking through the two-step UI login. Note the route naming inconsistency: SystemReports lives at /admin/reports (not /admin/system-reports); Reporting.jsx lives at /admin/reporting.
rca of the issue: No production bug found. Single unverified page (/admin/reports) consistently returned body_len=718 indicating Vite dev-server module-chunk throttling — the same environmental issue that affected 5 of 9 pages in iter218 on the first sweep. All 10 management pages have the expected ManagementShell wrapping and testIdPrefix in source, and 9 of them render correctly in the live preview with all required nav-card / title / toggle / refresh testids. Bills pagination implementation is correct (PAGE_SIZE=25 sliced from filteredBills, Pagination component with pagination-summary testid showing 'Showing 1-25 of 432 bills').
